title: Milford FC show interest in signing Birds star
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local football side...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local football side Oriented Birds' hard-working captain, Khanyisani \"Mashesha\" Radebe, displayed his skills during the prestigious annual off-season tournament in Durban.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Local football side Oriented Birds' hard-working captain, Khanyisani \"Mashesha\" Radebe, displayed his skills during the prestigious annual off-season tournament in Durban."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The educated left-footed player performed very well in the event, and impressed many soccer lovers.","html":"The educated left-footed player performed very well in the event, and impressed many soccer lovers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Radebe has played for Kwanokuthula's Oriented Birds for three seasons, and played for Simunye for one.","html":"Radebe has played for Kwanokuthula's Oriented Birds for three seasons, and played for Simunye for one."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Trains with NFD side"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He also played for AmaZulu FC (Dstv Diski Challenge team), and for the Golden Arrows FC development team few years ago.","html":"He also played for AmaZulu FC (Dstv Diski Challenge team), and for the Golden Arrows FC development team few years ago."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Just after showcasing his talent in the tournament, the 29-year-old star was invited to train with the National First Division side, better known as the Motsepe Foundation side, Milford FC.","html":"Just after showcasing his talent in the tournament, the 29-year-old star was invited to train with the National First Division side, better known as the Motsepe Foundation side, Milford FC."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They are currently in fourth position on the Motsepe Foundation log table.","html":"They are currently in fourth position on the Motsepe Foundation log table."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"'Gaining confidence'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Radebe said he \"feels good to be in the plans of the National First Division side after spending many years in the provincial leagues\". He started training with Milford FC on Thursday 2 January.","html":"Radebe said he \"feels good to be in the plans of the National First Division side after spending many years in the provincial leagues\". He started training with Milford FC on Thursday 2 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He added that he felt \"comfortable\", was \"gaining more confidence\", and had received a \"positive response from the other players\".","html":"He added that he felt \"comfortable\", was \"gaining more confidence\", and had received a \"positive response from the other players\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Radebe said the management of the team was \"very happy\" with his performance when they faced Sinenkani FC in their friendly game.","html":"Radebe said the management of the team was \"very happy\" with his performance when they faced Sinenkani FC in their friendly game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Khanyisani Radebe, the Birds captain, in action.","html":"Khanyisani Radebe, the Birds captain, in action."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
